THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ARSENIO XAR CHAPETON, LIZETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, NATALIA ESPINOZA, GUSTAVO $365.97 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $415.97, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $800.00, PLUS STATUTORY PENALTIES OF $00.00 PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1950.5. THESE DAMAGES ARE OFFSET BY PLAINTIFF'S UNPAID SHARE OF UTILITIES IN THE AMOUNT OF $140.70, AND 26 DAYS RENT ( DUE TO FAILURE TO PROVIDE 30 DAYS NOTICE) IN THE AMOUNT OF $693.33. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
